results.matched_effect_cluster: QuickSilver Adaptive Matryoshka Quantization entropy-based per-token
results.justification: EXACT TWIN — QuickSilver literally assigns per-token bit-widths BASED ON ENTROPY at mid-network layers, reducing compute on low-entropy spans. Same entropy-triggered transient precision switch. May 2026 publication.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Don't Waste Bits adaptive KV-cache quantization
results.justification: Adaptive KV-cache quantization with MLP controller using ENTROPY-BASED UNCERTAINTY + attention variance for per-token bit-width — same entropy-triggered precision mechanism.

results.matched_effect_cluster: QTALE token-adaptive layer execution + entropy regularization
results.justification: Token-adaptive execution integrated with quantization using entropy regularization.
Token-level entropy gating modulates inference per token — directly the signal pattern of CURLING-SWEEP.
